name: Apelkuchen (Apple Cake)
recipeInstructions:
To make dough:
1. In a saucepan, combine broth and butter. Heat to lukewarm.
2. In a large bowl of electric mixer, combine 4 cups flour, yeast, and sugar. Add broth mixture and eggs to dry ingredients. Beat at high speed for 2 minutes, scraping the bottom and sides of the bowl often.
3. Stir in remaining flour to make a soft dough, but not sticky. On lightly floured board, knead dough until smooth about 10 minutes; place in a greased bowl, turning once, cover; let rise in a warm place for 1 hour or until doubled.
4. Punch down on a lightly floured board. Roll out dough to fit a greased jelly roll pan (15 x 10 x 1). Press into corners of the pan.
To make topping:
1. Toss apples with lemon juice, 1/2 cup sugar, and 1 tsp cinnamon. Arrange apples in a single layer on the dough.
2. In a bowl, combine remaining sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse cornmeal. Sprinkle over apples; cover. Let rise until doubled about 1 hour.
3. Bake at 375°F for 35 minutes or until done. Makes 25 servings (3 x 2).
